module.name: no-non-null-assertion
module.description: Disallow non-null assertions using the "!" postfix operator.

scenarios.name: should allow optional chaining as an alternative to non-null assertion
scenarios.given: a member access using optional chaining obj?.prop

scenarios.name: should allow nullish coalescing as a safe fallback
should report a non-null assertion on a member expression
should report a non-null assertion on a call expression result
should suggest optional chaining for safe member and call forms
scenarios.given: expressions such as value!.prop, value![key], and value!()
scenarios.when: the non-null assertion is not used as an assignment or update target
scenarios.then: a noNonNullAssertion violation is reported with an optional-chaining suggestion
